subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great connecting at the conference, and I'd be glad to set up a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are a few slots that work on our end:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best for you and I'll get a calendar invite sent over.

As for your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information or personnel directory data. If you'd like to reach our technical leadership, I'd suggest using the contact channels on our public website and the right people will get back to you.

Looking forward to our conversation!

Best regards
